title: Entity Swim Idle Behavior
description: Allows the entity go idle, if swimming. Entity must be in water.

idle_time.title: Idle Time
idle_time.description: Amount of time (in seconds) to stay idle.

priority.title: Priority
priority.description: As priority approaches 0, the priority is increased. The higher the priority, the sooner this behavior will be executed as a goal.

success_rate.title: Success Rate
success_rate.description: Percent chance this entity will go idle, 1.0 = 100%.
